title: MonitorBlock
description: plugin utilized to monitor blocks. If someone has interacted with a certain block it is likely ESP.
body:
plugin utilized to monitor blocks. If someone has interacted with a certain block it is likely ESP. This plugin will send a message to a discord webhook if a certain block is interacted with. This is useful for server moderators because if they have a bait base used to identify 
people ESPing it will notify them as soon as the blocks within the base are interacted with.
